title: rumex acetosella var. minimus
intro: Rumex acetosella var. minimus, also known as the dwarf sorrel or lesser sorrel, is a variety of the sorrel plant that is characterized by its smaller size and narrower leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its high levels of vitamins A and C, potassium, and antioxidants. The health benefits of Rumex acetosella var. minimus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used to treat conditions such as sore throats, wounds, and skin irritations.
